name: Boombox - Phighting!
description:
boombox phighting sees you

uses animal demon hcs! (tanuki boombox) :3 also he's chubby. because I said so.

idk y'all I really love boombox. like. I don't know how to really convey how much I love the little guy he's just so hgGggGGHF💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚

again, I tried to make him as in-character as possible. sprinkled my own hcs in there, of course. maybe he'll tell you about how many instruments he can play or smth

pfp art by me. because I still refuse to use anyone else's art but my own (I'm weird)
creator: TBB7
